case_title: COMMERCIAL BUILDING SERVICES VS GOMEZ ROGELIA REYNALDO

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMMERCIAL BUILDING SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ ROGELIA REYNALDO $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,820.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
